error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: OneDrive Excel access denied due to credentials issue
symptom: When running a scheduled workflow, n8n throws an authorization error stating 'You do not have permissions to open this file in the browser'. This occurs consistently when the device is closed.
not_this_if: Using a Microsoft Business Basic account
root_cause: The error occurs because the credentials used do not have sufficient permissions to access the specified Excel file on OneDrive. This can happen if the account is not a paid Microsoft Business subscription, which is required for certain access levels.
fix_steps: Upgrade to a paid Microsoft Business subscription
Ensure the account has the necessary permissions to access the Excel file
agent_instruction: Upgrade to a paid Microsoft Business subscription for OneDrive access.
